name: taxonomy-handler
summary: WordPress-taxonomy-backed implementation of a datastore handler, plus a registrar for the taxonomy itself.
description: Creates a datastore handler that translates a typed PHPNomad datastore interface into WordPress term CRUD (wp_insert_term, get_term, WP_Term_Query, wp_update_term, wp_delete_term). Composes phpnomad/taxonomy so the taxonomy is registered alongside the handler.
problem: You already have a PHPNomad datastore (and its handler interface) and you want WordPress terms to be the actual backing storage — terms hold the records, term meta holds the extra fields — without writing the WP_Term_Query/term-meta plumbing by hand.
appliesWhen: You already have a datastore (phpnomad/datastore) needing a backing implementation
The data is term-shaped (classification, hierarchy, named labels)
Consumers should still go through the typed datastore (not get_terms directly)
You want the taxonomy registered as part of this scaffold, not separately
avoidWhen: You don't have a datastore yet (use phpnomad/taxonomy-datastore for the full bundle)
The data is genuinely relational and not term-shaped (use phpnomad/database-handler)
You want WordPress code to interact via get_terms directly with no datastore (use phpnomad/taxonomy alone)
examples: Back the RegionDatastore with the acme-region taxonomy
Wire the existing TopicDatastore to a topics taxonomy
tradeoffs: Implements all four datastore interfaces against WP term APIs. No abstract base — the generated class is the implementation. Where/findBy clauses translate to term meta_query, slow at scale. Use phpnomad/database-datastore for performance.
outputs: A {name} taxonomy registrar at lib/Taxonomies/{name}.php (via child recipe)
A getListeners() entry registering the registrar on Ready
A DI binding mapping the handler implementation to the handler interface
postApply: Edit register_taxonomy() args in the registrar (hierarchy, capabilities, rewrite, default_term)
Customize TERM_FIELDS in the handler — decide which model fields are term columns vs term meta
Fill in the model adapter's toArray/toModel translations
Smoke test create/find/update/delete through the datastore

name.description: Entity name shared across the registrar, the handler, and related datastore (PascalCase, no suffix)
name.aiHint: Singular PascalCase. Same name as the datastore/model/adapter.

taxonomy.aiHint: lowercase with optional dashes. Should be plugin-prefixed.

objectType.description: Post type slug this taxonomy attaches to
objectType.aiHint: Use the post type the taxonomy classifies.

pluralLabel.description: Plural display name shown in admin UI

singularLabel.description: Singular display name shown in admin UI

handlerInterface.description: FQCN of the datastore handler interface
handlerInterface.aiHint: Use the handler interface produced by phpnomad/datastore.

modelAdapter.description: FQCN of the model adapter class

initializer.description: FQCN of the initializer to register the listener and DI binding in
